Petition filed Petition challenges detention order and seeks production of the detenue. Justice Meera Kohli
Matter listed Listed for preliminary hearing and notice on maintainability. Justice Meera Kohli
Notice issued Notice issued to State and jail superintendent. Justice Meera Kohli
For notice and production status 12 Division Bench - Court 5 Court Hall 5 Justice Meera Kohli
Main writ petition Quash detention order | Produce detenue Detenue not produced within 24 hours | Family denied meeting Detention order | Arrest memo copy Constitution Article 22 | CrPC Section 57 DK Basu v. State of West Bengal Petitioner challenges detention procedure and seeks immediate production.
State status report Detention was preventive and records were updated Production was delayed by one day Family denied meeting Custody register extract NSA Section 3 State defends detention but acknowledges a one-day production delay.
File rejoinder to status report open Reply to admissions on delayed production and missing meeting memo.
District eCourts case history download Official case-history page saved by the operator.
Interim application on medical access Tagged in the same bench cause list for urgent mention.
